title: anguillaria australis
intro: Anguillaria australis, also known as the Austral Anguillaria or New Zealand Angelica, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Anguillaria australis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
